reviews.comment:

Hiper recomendación

One of the best gas stations with excellent service, parking, great coffee, and friendly staff. Highly recommended.

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención por parte de todos los empleados, sean los expendedores de combustible, los que atienden el estacionamiento, los empleados del service y quienes venden los repuestos del lado de Santa fe y Alte Brown.

Excellent service from all employees, from the fuel attendants and parking attendants to the service technicians and the parts vendors on the Santa Fe and Alte Brown side.

reviews.comment:
Automóvil Club. Además de combustibles mecánica, comidas rápidas, lubricentro, repuestos. Ofrece servicio para socios como verificación vehicular, registro de conducir e internacional. Buena atención, aceptan tarjetas de crédito y tienen descuentos en combustibles para socios.

(Translated by Google)
Automobile Club. In addition to fuel, mechanics, fast food, a lube center, and spare parts, it offers member services such as vehicle inspections, driver's license, and international driving license registration. Excellent service, they accept credit cards, and offer fuel discounts for members.
